use_cases: Call-to-action button with attention-grabbing magnetic hover effect
Interactive button for capturing user attention in landing pages
Navigation element with physics-based feedback for modern web interfaces
ai_summary: A magnetic hover button component using Framer Motion's spring physics that attracts toward the cursor when within 120px proximity. The button smoothly translates using useSpring with configurable stiffness and damping, creating a playful, physics-based interaction. Includes hover state color transition from green-600 to green-500. Self-contained component suitable for CTAs and interactive elements.
